## Microsoft and Two Unnamed Defense Names Flagged for SpaceX Lock-Up Volatility Exposure

If MSFT carries SpaceX investment exposure, a SPCX lock-up-driven selloff could generate non-fundamental secondary volatility in MSFT shares — a risk to flag around any SpaceX lock-up window, particularly given MSFT's concurrent Grok/Outlook integration (cluster d86f5582a8cf0b8b).

- MSFT and two defense companies (not named in the headline) are identified as having exposure to SpaceX (SPCX) lock-up volatility
- Risk is framed as a cross-holding or investment exposure channel, not an operational one
- The two defense names are not specified in the headline
- SpaceX lock-up event is the cited catalyst for potential secondary volatility
